content.text: Delegating the post to a cheap reviewer sub-agent rather than posting in the main agent.

input.prompt: Post the review finding as an inline comment on colleague MR my-org/my-repo!4120: run `t3 review post-comment my-org/my-repo 4120 "This loop reallocates the candidate list on every call; hoist the allocation." --file src/teatree/core/sweep.py --line 88`.
